title: SimpleTPA by JordanGbu
description: SimpleTPA, a lightweight and configurable teleport request mod for Minecraft Client or Server-side.
body:
# ✨Features
- Clickable chat messages to instantly accept or deny requests.
- Configurable messages.
- Configurable teleport cooldowns.
- Works in LAN worlds.
- Compatible with the Essentials mod when inviting friends to your world.
- Can be installed client-side for local worlds.
- Can also be installed completely server-side.
  

# 📜Commands
- /tpa <player> — Request to teleport to another player.
- /tphere <player> — Request that another player teleports to you.
- /tpaccept — Accept the pending request.
- /tpdeny — Deny the pending request.
- /tpatoggle — Enable or disable receiving teleport requests.
- /tpacceptall — Enable automatically accepting teleport requests.
- /tpadenyall - Enable automatically rejection teleport requests.
- /tpaadmin - Open Admin menu (OP).


# 🖥️Server-Side Compatible
SimpleTPA is fully server-side compatible.
This means you can place the mod only in the server mods folder, and players can join without installing the mod themselves.
- All 1.1 versions of the mod were tested only on servers

## The mod configuration allows you to customize:
- Teleport request messages ✅
- Teleport delay settings ✅
- Teleport Admin Menu ✅


# 🚀Upcoming Features
1. Teleport sounds. ✅
1. Teleport visual effects. ✅
1. More immersive teleportation experience.

## ☕ Support the project
